reviews_list.review_title: Arya College of Pharmacy is the best college for students.

review_content.Placements: Only one student was placed in 2023. Students got medical coding jobs. The package offered is 1.80 LPA. Top companies of pharma like Cipla, Sun Pharma, Hetero, Abbott Laboratories, and Zydus visit the college for placements. No one got internships in companies because of Coronavirus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but students do not use it. Only teachers and staff members used Wi-Fi. Labs are good but we do not perform practicals. Rooms are good and cleaning is also a daily routine. Libraries have good books for free for all courses. Hostel facilities are not available in this college.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is the best college and gives placement in big industries like Mankind, Cipla, etc.

review_content.Placements: I'm Saurabh Gangwar, pursuing a Bachelor of Pharmacy from Arya College of Pharmacy, Nawabganj, Bareilly. Approximately 60 students were placed in my course, with an average package ranging from 3 to 5 Lacs annually. 20% of students go for internships in pharma companies like Bal Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has large building blocks, and its Wi-Fi, labs, and GCR are available with good facilities and hygienic compartments and good facility members. We study carefully, and after lunch, we perform lab tests with different lab equipment, completing my B. Pharma in a very good manner.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Arya College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Our college placements are not good. Top roles offered in this course are industry jobs, drug inspectors, and other pharmacy jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel facility and canteen are not available at this college. Sports and games are available at this college. A good environment is available for games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is approximately good in this college. The relevant curriculum for this course is the best as it makes students industry-ready. There are no difficulties with the semester exams in this college. Almost 10% of students pass the exams.
